questionHtml:
How many chromosomes are there in a cell during anaphase of mitosis, if the diploid number of the cell is 20?

A. 10

B. 20

C. 40

D. 80

meta.title: How many chromosomes are there in a cell during anaphase of mitosis, if the diploid number of the cell is 20? A. 10 B. 20 C. 40 D. 80
